description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a weathered, beige stucco, giving the structure a slightly aged appearance. On one long side, there is a main entry door with a frosted glass panel and a decorative motif, accompanied by two rectangular windows with dark frames. The opposite long side features two additional windows, while one short end has a single window and the other is blank. The roof overhangs slightly, providing minimal eaves, and the house sits on a dark, narrow base. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A small, single-story house with a steep gable roof, beige stucco walls, and a simple entry door with windows. The design is plain and functional, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: End view showing the steep gable roof and a blank stucco wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_1: Side view featuring the main entry door with a frosted glass panel and two rectangular windows.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with a single window centered on the stucco wall beneath the gable roof.
description_view_3: Rear side view with two rectangular windows and no visible entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with frosted glass panel and decorative motif, no porch or overhang, flush with wall
